title: Verified Collaboration Copy Of Quarterly Access Review Policy
description: A synthetic collaboration repository copy verified as an exact copy of the approved policy export.

provenance.change_summary: Synthetic collaboration repository copy of the approved export.

permissions.handling_notes: Synthetic verified replica. The matching hash verifies byte identity with the approved export but does not make this repository the authority.

content_fingerprint.notes: Computed from the UTF-8 bytes of example_content in this repository file; the value matches the approved export.

verification.method: SHA-256 comparison against the approved export example_content.
verification.notes: Verified as an exact byte copy for the content represented in this public example.

example_content:
Synthetic Access Review Policy v2.0
Effective: 2026-01-01
Authority: Synthetic Policy Standards Board
Requirement: Privileged and business-critical access must be reviewed at least quarterly by an accountable owner.
